title: ERC Starting Grant
amount: Up to EUR 1.5 million over 5 years
eligibility: Early-career researchers (2–7 years post-PhD) who want to establish or consolidate their own research team in Europe. Open to any nationality.
documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through the ERC Funding & Tenders Portal with a host institution in an EU Member State or associated country.
application_instructions: Apply through the ERC Funding & Tenders Portal with a host institution in an EU Member State or associated country.

title: Marshall Scholarship
source: British Government – Marshall Aid Commemoration Commission
eligibility: Young Americans of high ability who can make a significant contribution to their own society, and act as ambassador for the US-UK relationship. Any field of study at any UK university.
documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter. See scholarship page for full list.
instructions: Apply through your university's pre-approval process and the Marshall Scholarship online portal.
provider_name: British Government – Marshall Aid Commemoration Commission
application_instructions: Apply through your university's pre-approval process and the Marshall Scholarship online portal.
